name: Bunuelos
recipeInstructions:
1. Work the shortening into the flour and salt using a pastry blender or your hands until combined.
2. Gradually add the warm water, stirring until the dough forms a ball.
3. Roll out the dough to thin rounds measuring 7-8 inches in diameter.
4. Heat oil in a shallow skillet until hot.
5. Cut each round into quarters and carefully drop them into the hot oil, cooking for about 30 seconds on each side until lightly browned.
6. Remove the fried dough from the oil using tongs or a slotted spoon and sprinkle with the topping mixture of sugar and cinnamon to taste.
7. Repeat with remaining dough rounds.
8. Makes approximately 15-16 tortilla rounds or around 60 bunuelos.
